name: The Faraway Eden
descriptionTemplate:
Team Unique: Gain Aliemus equal to [StateArg1]% Base Aliemus at the sart of battle. The wielder's Exalt Final DMG increases by a percentage equal to [StateArg2]% of Base Aliemus.
When switching to the {Raging Waves} stance, gain Temporary Realm Mastery equal to [StateArg3]% of your current Realm Mastery. 3-turn cooldown.
